calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Gary Hum appearing via zoom for and with Olallo Fernandes (Petitioner).

The Court finds that the Probate Code 6124 presumption is revoked. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated March 06, 2017 is admitted to probate. Olallo Fernades is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
